name: Lemon Jello Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the lemon jello in boiling water until fully dissolved.
2. Allow the mixture to cool slightly, then add oil.
3. Add the yellow cake mix and beat well until combined.
4. Add one egg at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Pour the batter into an angel food or tube pan that has been greased and floured.
6. Bake for 40 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
